data.title: New Oriental Sets Timetable for Second Cash Dividend Amid Ongoing Buyback Plan
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

New Oriental Education & Technology Group ( (HK:9901) ) has issued an announcement.

New Oriental Education & Technology Group has declared a second installment ordinary cash dividend of USD 0.06 per share for the financial year ending 31 May 2026, payable in U.S. dollars through its Hong Kong share register. The company updated key dates for this distribution, setting 14 May 2026 as the ex-dividend date, 15 May 2026 as the record date and deadline for share transfer registration, and 2 June 2026 as the payment date, providing clarity for shareholders on the timing of the payout alongside its previously announced share repurchase program.

The clarified dividend timetable underscores New Oriental’s ongoing efforts to return capital to shareholders and may be read by investors as a signal of confidence in its cash generation and financial stability. The combination of cash dividends and an established share repurchase program could enhance shareholder returns and potentially support the company’s market valuation in Hong Kong, while offering greater predictability for income-focused investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:9901) stock is a Buy with a HK$55.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on New Oriental Education & Technology Group stock, see the HK:9901 Stock Forecast page.

More about New Oriental Education & Technology Group

New Oriental Education & Technology Group Inc. is a China-based education services provider listed in Hong Kong, operating in the private education and training industry. The company offers a broad range of educational programs and services and is a well-known brand among Chinese students and parents seeking tutoring and test preparation services.

Average Trading Volume: 5,359,035

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$75.22B

data.title: Cyviz Extends Global Microsoft Pact and Delivers New Security Operations Centers
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Cyviz AS ( (DE:8P9) ) just unveiled an update.

Cyviz has secured a five-year extension of its global framework agreement with Microsoft, underscoring the strategic role of its collaboration and operations room technology in the tech giant’s global infrastructure. The renewed Master Services Agreement provides a long-term structure for worldwide rollouts, upgrades and services across Microsoft’s hub, envisioning and operations environments.

As part of the expanded collaboration, Cyviz will deliver Microsoft’s first operations center solution from the company, including a Global Security Operations Center and an Emergency Command Center in the U.S. to support critical security operations during major international events. The deal aligns with Cyviz’s strategy to grow recurring software and services revenue via scalable, platform-based offerings, while enhancing Microsoft’s ability to operate and manage advanced collaboration and operations globally, although contract values remain undisclosed.

More about Cyviz AS

Cyviz is a global technology provider specializing in advanced conference and control rooms, as well as command and experience centers for enterprises and governments. Founded in 1998, the company focuses on next‑generation collaboration spaces that emphasize user‑friendliness, security, quality and decision support, managed through a centralized platform for complex, multi-site environments.

Current Market Cap: NOK426.7M

data.title: Hon Hai Unit to Acquire Up to 12 Million Shares in Foxtron Vehicle Technologies
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Hon Hai Precision Industry ( (HNHPF) ) is now available.

Hon Hai Precision Industry announced that its subsidiary Bon Shin International Investments plans to acquire up to 12 million common shares of Foxtron Vehicle Technologies in a single-day transaction on April 22, 2026, as a long-term investment. Foxtron is an affiliated company, and while the exact purchase price, total consideration, and resulting ownership stake will be disclosed after the deal is completed, the move underscores Hon Hai’s strategy to deepen its investment in vehicle technologies and expand its footprint in the evolving electric and smart vehicle sector, with no rights restrictions or director dissent reported.

The company noted that key ratios such as the investment’s share of total assets and equity will be announced once the transaction details are finalized, with current working capital reported at NTD 317.9 billion. This incremental capital allocation into Foxtron signals continued commitment to its automotive ecosystem, which may influence Hon Hai’s long-term growth profile and reinforces its efforts to build a more integrated position across the vehicle technology value chain.

More about Hon Hai Precision Industry

Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd., also known as Foxconn, is a major global electronics manufacturer with a growing presence in electric vehicles and related technologies. Through its subsidiaries and affiliates, the company invests in automotive platforms and vehicle technologies to diversify beyond traditional contract electronics manufacturing and strengthen its position in future mobility markets.

An update from Helens International Holdings Company Limited ( (HK:9869) ) is now available.

Helens International Holdings Company Limited has called its annual general meeting for May 14, 2026, in Wuhan, where shareholders will review the audited consolidated financial statements and the directors’ and auditors’ reports for the year ended December 31, 2025. The agenda also includes the re-election of executive and independent non-executive directors, the election of a new executive director, re-appointment of PricewaterhouseCoopers as auditor, and authorization of a share repurchase mandate of up to 10% of issued shares, moves that collectively shape the company’s governance structure and capital management flexibility for the coming year.

More about Helens International Holdings Company Limited

Helens International Holdings Company Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong and Singapore, operates in the consumer and leisure sector, running bar and nightlife venues in China. The company targets young urban consumers with a chain-based model, positioning itself as a leading social entertainment brand in key city clusters.

data.title: H&H Delivers Strong Q1 Revenue Growth on China-Driven Nutrition Demand and Deleveraging
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Health and Happiness (H&H) International Holdings ( (HK:1112) ) has issued an update.

Health and Happiness (H&H) International Holdings reported a 34.4% year-on-year rise in first-quarter 2026 revenue to RMB4.26 billion, with high-margin nutritional supplements contributing nearly 60% of sales. Growth was broad-based across adult, baby and pet segments, aided by Chinese New Year seasonality and stronger demand for Biostime infant milk formulas in mainland China.

The Baby Nutrition and Care business led performance with a 60.9% increase, including a 74.4% surge in infant formula sales in China, while Adult Nutrition and Care grew 26.3% and Pet Nutrition and Care achieved modest gains but faster growth in premium pet supplements such as Zesty Paws. The group also continued to deleverage, cutting gross debt by over RMB300 million by voluntarily prepaying more than RMB500 million of its U.S. dollar term loan, supported by stronger internal liquidity and cheaper renminbi borrowing, which strengthens its balance sheet and financial flexibility.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1112) stock is a Buy with a HK$15.80 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Health and Happiness (H&H) International Holdings stock, see the HK:1112 Stock Forecast page.

More about Health and Happiness (H&H) International Holdings

Health and Happiness (H&H) International Holdings is a Hong Kong–listed health and wellness company focused on baby nutrition and care, adult nutrition and care, and pet nutrition and care. Its portfolio includes infant milk formula, paediatric probiotics, vitamins and supplements, and premium pet supplements, with significant exposure to the Chinese mainland, Australia-New Zealand and selected expansion markets.

data.title: Sirnaomics Moves to Replace 2022 Equity Plan With New 2026 Share Option Scheme
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Sirnaomics Ltd. ( (HK:2257) ).

Sirnaomics Ltd. plans to terminate its share option scheme adopted in 2022 and introduce a new 2026 Share Option Scheme aligned with the latest Chapter 17 requirements of the Hong Kong listing rules. Options already granted under the existing scheme will remain valid and exercisable, and the board will not issue further options from the old plan ahead of a forthcoming shareholder vote.

The new 2026 Share Option Scheme is designed to offer a more flexible and compliant framework for retaining and incentivizing eligible participants through share-based rewards. Its adoption is subject to shareholder approval at an extraordinary general meeting and the Hong Kong Stock Exchange’s listing approval for any new shares to be issued, with a circular outlining full details to be sent to investors in due course.

More about Sirnaomics Ltd.

Sirnaomics Ltd., incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong, operates in the biopharmaceutical sector, focusing on the development of RNA-based therapeutics. The company targets global healthcare markets and uses equity-based incentive schemes to attract and retain key talent as it advances its pipeline and commercial ambitions.

data.title: JiaChen Holding Plans Governance Overhaul to Enable Hybrid AGMs and Align With New HKEX Rules
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from JiaChen Holding Group Limited ( (HK:1937) ) is now available.

JiaChen Holding Group Limited plans to amend its existing memorandum and articles of association to enable hybrid and fully electronic general meetings, including electronic voting, and to align with updated Hong Kong listing rules on electronic corporate communications, treasury share arrangements and the upcoming uncertificated securities market regime. The company intends to adopt a second amended and restated memorandum and articles of association consolidating all changes, which will take effect upon approval by shareholders via special resolution at the annual general meeting scheduled for 12 June 2026, with full details to be set out in a circular to investors.

These governance updates aim to modernize JiaChen’s corporate framework, improve flexibility in how shareholder meetings are conducted and ensure compliance with evolving regulatory standards in Hong Kong’s capital markets. The move could streamline shareholder engagement, reduce administrative burdens and better position the company for future market infrastructure changes, potentially enhancing transparency and accessibility for investors.

More about JiaChen Holding Group Limited

JiaChen Holding Group Limited is a Cayman Islands–incorporated company listed in Hong Kong under stock code 1937. It operates through a group structure with subsidiaries in mainland China, overseen by a board comprising executive and independent non-executive directors based in Changzhou, the People’s Republic of China.

Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd. ( (AU:SEC) ) has shared an update.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited reported an estimated pre-tax net tangible asset backing of $2.327 per share as at 21 April 2026, based on the daily value of its investment portfolio and cash. The figure is unaudited, approximate, and calculated after management and performance fees and expected movements in operating costs and income taxes.

The disclosed NTA per share is stated before a dividend of 1.1 cents per share that is scheduled to be paid on 30 April 2026, with an ex-dividend date of 23 April 2026. This update gives shareholders an indication of the company’s current asset backing ahead of the dividend payment, helping investors assess portfolio value and the impact of upcoming distributions.

More about Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited is an ASX-listed investment company focused on emerging companies, providing investors exposure to a portfolio of smaller-cap equities. The company manages an investment portfolio and associated cash balances, charging management and performance fees while targeting capital growth through active portfolio management.

data.title: Predictive Discovery shifts head office as West African gold portfolio grows
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Predictive Discovery Limited ( (AU:PDI) ) has shared an announcement.

Predictive Discovery Limited has changed its registered office and principal place of business to new premises on Charles Street in South Perth, Western Australia, effective immediately. The relocation formalises the company’s corporate presence in South Perth while its operational focus remains firmly on its West African gold assets.

The move comes as Predictive Discovery advances its transition into a mid-tier, multi-mine producer, underpinned by cash flow from the Kiniero and Nampala gold mines and development of the large-scale Bankan project in Guinea. The administrative update signals ongoing corporate maturation, aligning head office arrangements with the company’s expanding production and development pipeline in West Africa.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:PDI) stock is a Buy with a A$0.74 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Predictive Discovery Limited stock, see the AU:PDI Stock Forecast page.

More about Predictive Discovery Limited

Predictive Discovery Limited is a West African gold production and development company with a portfolio of high-quality assets and a strong financial platform. Its operations are anchored by the Kiniero Gold Mine in Guinea, which began production in late 2025, and the Nampala Gold Mine in Mali, in operation since 2017, providing cash flow to fund its growth plans.

The company’s key growth project is the Tier-1 Bankan Gold Project in Guinea, one of Africa’s largest undeveloped gold deposits, expected to produce about 250,000 ounces annually over more than 12 years. Once Bankan is online, Predictive Discovery is targeting group production of over 400,000 ounces a year by 2029, aiming to become a mid-tier, multi-mine West African gold producer focused on sustainable value creation.

Average Trading Volume: 17,339,381

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$4.65B
